'''''Journey to Mos Eisley''''' is a children's book by [[Golden Books]] that was released in [[March]] [[1998]].<ref name="Amazon" /> The book explores the events on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].

==Publisher's summary==
''Join Luke Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi as they embark on a mission to a wretched hive of villains—the Mos Eisley spaceport! This classic space adventure is illustrated with actual photos from the Special Edition ''STAR WARS'' TRILOGY!<ref name="Cargo" />''

{{Plot|adaptation}}
